inputs.text: Main thaka hua mehsoos kar raha hoon, bukhar bhi hai aur sar dard hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Low-grade fever and malaise are common in viral fever

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Headache and fatigue can be seen in gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Although typhoid is a possibility, the symptoms are not specific enough at this stage

inputs.text: Mere bukhar roz badh raha hai, pet dard bhi hai aur kabz ki samasya hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Step-wise fever and constipation are indicative of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Abdominal pain and constipation can also be seen in gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever is less likely given the progression of symptoms

inputs.text: Ab mere bukhar bahut tez ho gaya hai, kabz ke baad dast ho gaya hai aur mujhe bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Tez bukhar, kabz ke baad dast, and severe weakness are cardinal signs of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Although possible, the combination of symptoms is more indicative of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria is less likely given the absence of specific symptoms like chills and rigors

inputs.text: Ab main bahut thaka hua hoon, bukhar abhi tak baqi hai aur mujhe pet mein bahut dard ho raha hai, main daroon ki meri intestine mein ched ho jaye

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: The persistence of high fever, abdominal pain, and risk of intestinal perforation confirm typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the progression and severity of symptoms

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the lack of specific symptoms and the progression of the disease
